name: Microsoft Teams
description: Talk to this agent from Microsoft Teams — inbound Bot Framework JWT validation and replies over the Bot Connector API via eve's teamsChannel.
setup:
1. In **Azure**, create an **App registration** (or an **Azure Bot** resource) to get an **App ID** → `MICROSOFT_APP_ID` and a **client secret / password** → `MICROSOFT_APP_PASSWORD`. For a single-tenant bot, also set `MICROSOFT_TENANT_ID`; leave it blank for multi-tenant.
2. Deploy the agent, then set the bot's **messaging endpoint** to `https://<your-domain>/e/<environmentId>/eve/v1/teams`.
3. Add the bot to the **Teams** channel in the Azure Bot resource, and install it into a team or chat.

eve validates each inbound Activity against the Bot Connector bearer JWT and replies over the Bot Framework Connector API. Proactive messages need an existing conversation reference, so the agent must be messaged first.

secrets.name: MICROSOFT_APP_ID
secrets.description: Azure Bot / app registration ID (Bot Framework app id).

secrets.name: MICROSOFT_APP_PASSWORD
secrets.description: The app registration's client secret / password.

secrets.name: MICROSOFT_TENANT_ID
secrets.description: Azure tenant ID — set only for single-tenant bots; leave blank for multi-tenant.
